visa_types.name: Business/ Conference
visa_types.documents_required:
- Document Checklist  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3PIvr54DvAe4o1U3AvNik8/ce52de64e83d4c5405e5b83349965b2a/Business-Checklist-Jan-2026.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[svk > usa > en > Visa Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 Euros/ 54 USD (Inclusive of all taxes) payable online while booking appointment or through Debit/Credit Card at the centre.
Please Note:
- Children between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in USD is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
visa_types.processing_time: From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it can take upto 15 working days or more to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.
visa_types.forms:
Application for Visa ( Slovak Language )
Application for Visa ( English Language )
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days. This visa will be issued for business purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.
Please note that nationals of the third countries listed below shall submit a police-certified invitation to their application, regardless of the purpose of the journey. Information on exemptions will be provided by the diplomatic missions. 
- Bangladesh, Belarus, Iran, Morocco, Pakistan, Vietnam
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Business visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for business purposes. This visa is given for travel period of less than 90 days. This visa will be issued for business purpose only; for gainful professional activities (even if the work is not financially rewarded) you have to apply for a work permit.
Please note that nationals of the third countries listed below shall submit a police-certified invitation to their application, regardless of the purpose of the journey. Information on exemptions will be provided by the diplomatic missions. 
- Bangladesh, Belarus, Iran, Morocco, Pakistan, Vietnam

## Visa Fees

[svk > usa > en > Visa Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 Euros/ 54 USD (Inclusive of all taxes) payable online while booking appointment or through Debit/Credit Card at the centre.
Please Note:
- Children between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in USD is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
- Document Checklist  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/3PIvr54DvAe4o1U3AvNik8/ce52de64e83d4c5405e5b83349965b2a/Business-Checklist-Jan-2026.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 3 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please paste the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs at the photo booth when they are at the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it can take upto 15 working days or more to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa ( Slovak Language )
Application for Visa ( English Language )
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for other purposes like medical treatment or undertaking vocational training/ courses for a period of less than 90 days
Please note that nationals of the third countries listed below shall submit a police-certified invitation to their application, regardless of the purpose of the journey. Information on exemptions will be provided by the diplomatic missions. 
- Bangladesh, Belarus, Iran, Morocco, Pakistan, Vietnam
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for other purposes like medical treatment or undertaking vocational training/ courses for a period of less than 90 days
Please note that nationals of the third countries listed below shall submit a police-certified invitation to their application, regardless of the purpose of the journey. Information on exemptions will be provided by the diplomatic missions. 
- Bangladesh, Belarus, Iran, Morocco, Pakistan, Vietnam

## Visa Fees

[svk > usa > en > Visa Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid by Debit/Credit Card.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 Euros/ 54 USD (Inclusive of all taxes) payable online while booking appointment or through Debit/Credit Card at the centre.
Please Note:
- Children between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee in USD is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
- Document Checklist  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/20tUMyWhqvjgPHREMvO8OW/864ef21a57c9d7eea02205a9a8502cca/Others-Checklist-Jan-2026.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 3 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of their religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please paste the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs at the photo booth when they are at the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it can take upto 15 working days or more to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.

visa_types.name: Family member/ Spouse and children of EA/ EU citizens/nationals
visa_types.documents_required:
- Document Checklist  (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/6w44LUDPyImJ6xJLrrQIHo/4c4dd0eb3e75057d0cd9be1ddc0b632a/EU-Family-member-Checklist-Jan-2026.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[svk > usa > en > Visa Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid by Debit/Credit Card at the centre.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 Euros/ 54 USD (Inclusive of all taxes) payable online while booking appointment or through Debit/ Credit Card at the centre.
Please Note:
- Children between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- The applicable visa fee will be charged in USD is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.
- The service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
The visa fee is waived for:
- spouses and children of EU citizens/nationals. The spouse must present a marriage certificate /duly translated into English language if necessary/ and valid EU citizen’s passport. For accompanying minors, birth certificates must be presented.
- students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training;
- researchers, as defined in point (2) of Article 3 of Directive (EU) 2016/801 of the European Parliament and of the Council (*4), travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research or participating in a scientific seminar or conference
- representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events.
visa_types.processing_time: From the date of receipt of application at the Embassy of Slovakia, it can take upto 15 working days or more to process the visa application. The duration of days when the application is in transit between the Visa Application Centre and the Embassy are not counted.
visa_types.forms:
Application for Visa ( Slovak Language )
Application for Visa ( English Language )
To Download a Form:
- Click on the form link
- When the form opens, save the form on your computer.
OR
- Press the right button on your mouse on the required link.
- Select Save Target As from the list
- Save the form on your computer.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters to individuals travelling to Slovakia as family member/ Spouse or children of EA/ EU citizens or nationals.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to individuals travelling to Slovakia as family member/ Spouse or children of EA/ EU citizens or nationals.

## Visa Fees

[svk > usa > en > Visa Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid by Debit/Credit Card at the centre.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 45 Euros/ 54 USD (Inclusive of all taxes) payable online while booking appointment or through Debit/ Credit Card at the centre.
Please Note:

- The applicable visa fee will be charged in USD is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice.

The visa fee is waived for:

- students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training;
- researchers, as defined in point (2) of Article 3 of Directive (EU) 2016/801 of the European Parliament and of the Council (*4), travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research or participating in a scientific seminar or conference

## Photo Specifications

If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs at the photo booth when they are at the visa application centre.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for Tourist purposes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
Please note that nationals of the third countries listed below shall submit a police-certified invitation to their application, regardless of the purpose of the journey. Information on exemptions will be provided by the diplomatic missions. 
- Bangladesh, Belarus, Iran, Morocco, Pakistan, Vietnam
